blocks.text: Hallelujah. א Happy is the man who fears the Lord, ב who is ardently devoted to His commandments.
ג His descendants will be mighty in the land, ד a blessed generation of upright men.
ה Wealth and riches are in his house, ו and his beneficence lasts forever.
ז A light shines for the upright in the darkness; ח he is gracious, compassionate, and beneficent.
ט All goes well with the man who lends generously, י who conducts his affairs with equity.
כ He shall never be shaken; ל the beneficent man will be remembered forever.
מ He is not afraid of evil tidings; נ his heart is firm, he trusts in the Lord.
ס His heart is resolute, he is unafraid; ע in the end he will see the fall of his foes.
פ He gives freely to the poor; צ his beneficence lasts forever; ק his horn is exalted in honor.
ר The wicked man shall see it and be vexed; ש he shall gnash his teeth; his courage shall fail. ת The desire of the wicked shall come to nothing.
